title: Schauwerk Live Companion and Visual Truth v1
goal: Close the gap between deterministic Schauwerk composition and observable Miro reality through provider-reference drift checks, a deployable Web SDK companion contract, authenticated visual evidence and a small Golden Board corpus.
completion: The Miro capability audit separates observed live catalogue, official-reference snapshot and adapter coverage.

The deterministic Web SDK companion is merged, deployed to repository-owned HTTPS hosting and its fail-closed release doctor records the missing GitHub Pages security headers without inventing a PASS.
Authenticated provider captures remain receipt-bound to exact board and image evidence.
Three intentionally distinct Golden Board compositions pass deterministic package, preview and quality checks.
PR #100, CI, complete diff, bound review, Pages deployment, Developer App installation and authenticated in-board Web SDK readback are complete.

metadata.authorization: User authorized public HTTPS companion deployment and the associated Miro Developer App path on 2026-07-17.
metadata.outcome: The companion is live on GitHub Pages and operates inside Miro with read-only board access. Header-capable hosting remains an explicit separate hardening initiative because GitHub Pages lacks the required response headers even though the real Miro embedding succeeded.
